name: Steam Trends
description: Steam concurrent players by game over time, monthly trends and growth. Free key at trendsmcp.ai
longDescription: Steam player trends MCP server for tracking game momentum and player counts. Get time-series data, growth percentages, and trending games from Steam. Part of Trends MCP network.
author: ai.trendsmcp

apiKeyConfig.label: API Key / Bearer Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Bearer token. Get your free API key at https://trendsmcp.ai

examplePrompts: What are the top trending games on Steam right now?
How is the player count for this game growing?
Find the fastest growing games this month
